rows.description: Stip Guineas ad Festum S. Michl
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini's candidate was disqualified due to invalid pence (15). Visual verification shows 116 pounds, 24 shillings, and 15 pence. Both shillings (24) and pence (15) violate standard ledger rules (shillings < 20, pence < 12). Overrode by converting: 24 shillings = 1 pound 4 shillings; 15 pence = 1 shilling 3 pence. Thus, 116 + 1 pounds, 4 + 1 shillings, 3 pence results in 117 pounds, 5 shillings, 3 pence. This interpretation brings the values within valid ranges.
rows.english_description: Stipend (in guineas) paid at the Feast of St Michael.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend (in guineas) paid at the Feast of St Michael, amounting to £117 5s 3d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini's candidate was disqualified due to invalid pence (15). Visual verification shows 117 pounds, 37 shillings, and 15 pence. Both shillings (37) and pence (15) violate standard ledger rules. Overrode by converting: 37 shillings = 1 pound 17 shillings; 15 pence = 1 shilling 3 pence. Thus, 117 + 1 pounds, 17 + 1 shillings, 3 pence results in 118 pounds, 18 shillings, 3 pence. Corrected description from gpt-5-mini's '(com: de Wittenham ?lange)' to 'com: de Wittenham Longe' based on visual inspection.
